Two meters at Lagide with offshore breeze; might find a ramp or two, might find a closeout.
🌊 Swell: 2.0m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 13.0km/h SSE (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 19.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 1.8m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 1.8m and that wind, today's session will be less about riding and more about survival.

programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 14s CROSS

programme.desc:

programme.desc:

programme.title: 💨 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 23.0km/h S (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 39.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.8m
